data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protection against Distributed Denial of Service attacks to ensure availability.
data.technical_spec: Edge network protection and Cloud Armor systems.

data.title: Authentication and Identity Management
data.description: Manages user identities and secures authentication processes.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures data in transit and at rest are encrypted to protect user privacy.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL for data in transit, AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Content Monitoring
data.description: Monitors video content for violations of policies using automated systems and human reviewers.

data.title: User Data Protection
data.description: Protects user data against unauthorized access and breaches.
data.technical_spec: Data Loss Prevention APIs, GDPR compliance features.
